(1) TOAST: Tue Jun 23 Group/All-Locations summary now in hand -- Net $5,124.30 / Gross $5,231.20 / 199 guests / 133 orders / avg/guest $25.75 / avg/order $38.53 / Labor 23.1% / Discounts 2.0% ($106.90) / Voids 14 / Gift cards $100. (3) GOOGLE ADS: LIVE scrape, Yesterday (Jun 23) = 7,114 impr / 143 clicks / CTR 2.01% / Avg CPC $0.38 / cost $53.78; budget $58.37/day; 0 conversions (tracking still not firing). Per-campaign: World Cup $19.93, Oldest SB $0 (paused), Local PMax-2 $13.17, BHC $20.68. (5) TRIPADVISOR: no analytics email.
